DP.457.0001:
...I saw it!
Today’s number is [0133,0000]!\f
Show me a Pokémon that’s Lv. [0133,0000].
If you can, I’ll reward you.\f
...Oh, now, hunh?!\f
Your [0100,0001] is Lv. [0133,0000].
Well, I’ll be! How remarkable!\f
I’ll thank you for that visual treat
with this [0108,0002].\f
DP.457.0002:
Oh? You’ve no room in your Bag.
I’ll hold it, so come back later.
DP.457.0003:
I’ll thank you for that visual treat
with this [0108,0002].\f
DP.457.0004:
High-level Pokémon were once of low
level.\f
Low-level Pokémon will not remain so,
for they can only grow.\f
That’s how it goes, youngster.
Come again tomorrow.
DP.457.0005:
Win Items from Me!\f
Black Belt: Powers up Fighting-type
moves.\f
Expert Belt: Powers up moves if they
are super effective.\f
Focus Sash: The bearer avoids
a one-hit KO if its HP is full.
